signals.headline: Key context:** Early 2026 saw a sharp downturn in Ethereum's value due to recession concerns and activity by co-founder
signals.raw:
Key context:** Early 2026 saw a sharp downturn in Ethereum's value due to recession concerns and activity by co-founder Vitalik Buterin.[1] However, the Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade was in its final testing phase as of April 18, with Spot Ethereum ETF inflows reaching all-time highs.[2]
